note: Expected outputs derived by hand-computing per thresholds.yaml rules against raw_data.json. Ranges used where a single point is ambiguous.

expected_layer_1_regime.reasoning: 180d trend slope positive but recent period shows emerging breakout rather than established trend. ADX(1d) likely 22-28 (at boundary of weak/strong per thresholds.layer_1_regime.adx). MA-20/60/120 stacking upward.

expected_layer_2_direction.reasoning: HH+HL structure on 1D; price above MA-60 and MA-120; stance_confidence should clear the early_bull long threshold of 0.55
expected_layer_2_direction.phase_reasoning: impulse extension ratio < 50% (recent breakout from $10.5K base to $11.4K); swing HH+HL pronounced; price not yet far above MA-60

long_cycle_context.reasoning: MVRV Z 1.2 ∈ [-0.5, 2] → early_bull candidate; NUPL 0.37 straddles early_bull/mid_bull; LTH 90d +1.5% = stable/accumulating. Voting pool: 2-of-3 agree on early_bull → confidence 0.60-0.85 per cycle_position_decision.voting

expected_layer_3_opportunity.reasoning: Matches long_grade_rules.B: regime ∈ {trend_up, transition_up} AND stance=bullish AND conf ≥ early_bull threshold 0.55 AND phase ∈ {early, mid, late} AND position ≠ above_all_key_levels. Upgrade to A is possible if position is confirmed near_support.

expected_layer_4_risk.reasoning: No hard_invalidation breach; funding mild positive (not extreme); OI stable; crowding score ~2-3 (normal).
expected_layer_4_risk.position_cap_reasoning: base 70 × risk_moderate 0.9 = 63 × crowding_normal 1.0 × macro_neutral 1.0 × event_low 1.0 = 63. Floor 15% not hit.

expected_layer_5_macro.reasoning: DXY -1.2% 20d (below -2% trigger) + VIX 27.5 (above 25 elevated) + nasdaq +2.5% 20d (below +5% trigger). Mixed signals.

observation_category_reasoning: Does not match disciplined (regime is not chaos/transition of bearish sense, stance not neutral, cycle not unclear, risk not high/critical). Matches watchful: stance is bullish, opportunity_grade is B (∈ {C, none}? No — B! so actually does NOT match watchful's 'grade ∈ {C, none}' condition).  →  REVIEWED: if grade = B, the observation_classifier rules put this between watchful and possibly_suppressed. However possibly_suppressed requires grade = none + persistence ≥ 7d. Since grade is B (active opportunity), the pipeline does NOT classify as any of the three — this case needs a 4th outcome or rule clarification. Expected: watchful (pragmatic), FLAG for Sprint 1 to verify rule completeness.

expected_m26_acceptance_result.m26_requirement: At least one A-grade or B-grade long_planned or long_open trigger within the uptrend window
expected_m26_acceptance_result.reasoning: Grade B + bullish + can_open satisfies FLAT → LONG_PLANNED transition rules in state_machine.yaml

validation_notes: Ranges used intentionally — exact indicator values depend on full price path which has seeded-random elements.
All ranges should be satisfied for this scenario to pass M26.
If computed value falls outside range, either code is buggy OR scenario calibration is off — investigate both.
